content.text:
It's not irrational, though. The numbers are real. A serious health event, long-term care for two parents -- those costs are documented. I've run the scenarios.

But... yeah. Okay. There's something that doesn't feel like math. When I imagine actually stopping, there's this -- I don't know. Like the floor might not hold. Even when I know it will.

It's probably just prudence. I've always been careful with money. That's how you get to 1.4.
